apiKey.label: Memaster API Key
apiKey.help: API key from Memaster Dashboard (or use ${MEMASTER_API_KEY}).

baseUrl.label: Base URL
baseUrl.help: Memaster API endpoint. Override only for self-hosted deployments.

userId.label: Default User ID
userId.help: Stable identifier for the end user. Memories are scoped to this value.

agentId.label: Agent ID
agentId.help: Optional agent identifier, useful when multiple agents share the same user.

project.label: Project
project.help: Optional project name attached to every memory as metadata.project.

scope.label: Scope
scope.help: Optional topical scope attached as metadata.scope.

source.label: Source
source.help: Optional source label attached as metadata.source. Defaults to openclaw.

autoCapture.label: Auto-Capture
autoCapture.help: Automatically extract and store memories after each agent turn.

autoRecall.label: Auto-Recall
autoRecall.help: Automatically inject relevant memories before each agent turn.

topK.label: Top K
topK.help: Maximum number of memories returned by recall and search.

infer.label: Server-side Extraction
infer.help: When enabled, auto-capture asks Memaster to extract durable facts from the conversation. Otherwise raw turns are stored verbatim. Requires a Growth plan.
